Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Changelog: Polish and an honest router. The router now asks the data center before sending gear to GC turn-in: never-sold gear used to lose to seals automatically - now DC-wide sale history can veto, and the reason names the evidence. Router window can grow as wide as you like. Thin-history items get their community sales prefetched at run start, so they price the same run instead of 'next pinch'. The slow-mover discount no longer cuts below lane verdicts (it was quietly shaving 5-10% under your own floors and premiums). Log lines cleaned up: no more doubled [Scrooge] prefix, fetch results visible without debug logging.
